problem: Patients with chronic kidney disease and end-stage renal disease require coordinated, ongoing dialysis treatment and kidney care management, but face fragmented care delivery and limited access to education and support services
solution: Comprehensive kidney care platform providing in-center and home dialysis services (hemodialysis and peritoneal dialysis), kidney disease education, GFR calculators, diet management resources, and care coordination services. Operates a national network of dialysis centers with integrated clinical and patient engagement tools
